notes: HAR-636 parity for shopPolicyUpdate title casing, policy URL fallback derivation, migrated body rendering, and the 524287/524288 byte body limit edge. The captured public 2026-04 dev shop returned sentence-case titles and checkout.shopify.com URLs, while the ticket's cited Shopify source maps titles through ShopPolicy::DEPRECATED_POLICY_TITLES and the proxy cannot hydrate a true shop.checkout_url from Admin shop fields. Expected differences therefore assert the requested title-case proxy value and the documented primary-domain URL fallback shape while still comparing body, type, userErrors, and selected timestamps strictly.

expectedDifferences.reason: The live dev-shop capture returned the older sentence-case title, but HAR-636 is scoped to the Shopify source-backed deprecated title map.
The proxy emits deterministic local timestamps for staged policies.

The live capture exposes Shopify's checkout host, which is not present in the Admin shop hydrate; the proxy must use its documented primary-domain fallback and preserve Shopify's numeric policy path shape.
